---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a defect in Istar Pack
title: "[BUG] <short summary>"
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear, one-sentence description of what is wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full error message if any.

## Environment

- Windows version:
- PowerShell edition and version (run `$PSVersionTable` and paste the output):
- Istar Pack version (shown in the banner, e.g. `v1.0.0`):
- Have you run Istar Pack on this machine before? (yes / no):
- Which menu option did you select? (Full install / Select theme / Verify / etc.):

## Selected Theme

Which theme was active when the bug occurred (e.g. Garden's Dream, Midnight Cyber, ...).

## Logs / Screenshots

If applicable, paste the relevant console output or attach a screenshot. The
Istar Pack banner itself contains useful version and runtime information, so
please include it.

## Additional Context

Anything else that might help us diagnose the issue. Did you recently update
Windows, install a new terminal, or change your execution policy?
